_comment: Seize the Seas — AUDIO MANIFEST. Data-driven: the founder drops audio files into music/ (and optionally sfx/) and adds ONE line here. No code changes needed. Prefer small, seamlessly-looping .ogg with an .mp3 fallback. Each track entry may be a string (single file) or an object { ogg, mp3, gain, loopStart, loopEnd }. A scene with MULTIPLE tracks rotates between them on each setScene() to that scene.

sfx._comment: OPTIONAL file-based SFX. If omitted, sfx.js synthesizes everything (zero asset). To use a file instead, add name -> filename (in sfx/).
